name: Action
description: High-octane movies featuring stunts, chases, and heroic battles.

name: Adventure
description: Journeys to exciting and exotic locations, full of discovery.

name: Animation
description: Artistic storytelling through hand-drawn or computer-generated visuals.

name: Comedy
description: Humorous stories designed to entertain and provoke laughter.

name: Crime
description: Tales of criminals, detectives, and the darker side of society.

name: Documentary
description: Fact-based explorations of real people, places, and events.

name: Drama
description: Character-driven stories focusing on emotional and relational conflict.

name: Family
description: Wholesome entertainment suitable for viewers of all ages.

name: Fantasy
description: Imaginary worlds filled with magic, myth, and wonder.

name: History
description: Narratives based on significant historical events and figures.

name: Horror
description: Stories designed to elicit fear, suspense, and terror.

name: Music
description: Films where music and performance play a central role.

name: Mystery
description: Suspenseful stories revolving around solving a secret or crime.

name: Romance
description: Stories focused on love, relationships, and emotional intimacy.

name: Sci-Fi
description: Futuristic concepts involving science, technology, and space.

name: Thriller
description: Fast-paced stories filled with tension, excitement, and suspense.

name: War
description: Narratives focusing on military conflict and the human experience of war.

name: Western
description: Stories set in the American Old West involving outlaws and frontiersmen.
